title: MiniMax M3 获 mlx-vlm 支持并完成测试
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
We love what the community is building with M3 open weights ♥️
Excited for what’s next
Ivan Fioravanti ᯅ
@ivanfioravanti
Jun 13
MiniMax M3 support added to mlx-vlm with MSA implementation! 🚀
Tested on M3 Ultra 512GB running at 24 tps with peak memory ~240GB.
Now working on optimizing performance and adding ton of tests 💪
Model is here: huggingface.co/mlx-community/…
PR is here: github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vl…
00:00
9:44 AM · Jun 13, 2026 13.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: MiniMax M3 获 mlx-vlm 支持并完成测试
discovery_record.discovery_summary: MiniMax M3 支持已添加到 mlx-vlm，包含 MSA 实现！🚀 在 M3 Ultra 512GB 上测试，运行速度 24 tps，峰值内存约 240GB。目前正在优化性能并添加大量测试 💪 模型：https：//huggingface.co/mlx-community/MiniMax-M3-4bit PR：https：//github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vlm/pull/1374 我们喜爱社区用 M3 开放权重构建的一切 ♥️ 期待下一步

key_excerpts.text: MiniMax M3 支持已添加到 mlx-vlm，包含 MSA 实现！🚀 在 M3 Ultra 512GB 上测试，运行速度 24 tps，峰值内存约 240GB。目前正在优化性能并添加大量测试 💪 模型：https：//huggingface.co/mlx-community/MiniMax-M3-4bit PR：https：//github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vlm/pull/1374 我们喜爱社区用 M3 开放权重构建的一切 ♥️ 期待下一步

Post Log in Sign up Post MiniMax (official) @MiniMax_AI We love what the community is building with M3 open weights ♥️ Excited for what’s next Ivan Fioravanti ᯅ @ivanfioravanti Jun 13 MiniMax M3 support added to mlx-vlm with MSA implementation!
🚀 Tested on M3 Ultra 512GB running at 24 tps with peak memory ~240GB.
Now working on optimizing performance and adding ton of tests 💪 Model is here: huggingface.
